description: You are logged into the wger fitness manager at http://localhost as admin (username: admin, password: adminadmin). In the 'Push-Pull-Legs Split' workout routine, create a new training day named 'Push 2' that replicates the 'Push 1' training day. 'Push 2' must contain the same three exercises in the same order, with the identical number of sets and repetitions as found in 'Push 1'. Do not modify or delete the original 'Push 1' day.
